english_text: I didn't ask for this fate
Every moment with you is a miracle
Life and death are not in my hands
korean_text: 생사는 내 손에 달린 게 아니야
romanization: saengsaneun nae sone dallin ge aniya

english_text: The weather changes with my mood
You're my first and last love
I'll find you in the next life
Make a wish on the first snow
I was lonely before I met you
Now I have a reason to live
Some things are meant to be
The most ordinary days are the most precious
korean_text: 가장 평범한 날이 가장 소중한 날이야
romanization: gajang pyeongbeomhan nari gajang sojunghan nariya

english_text: I'm grateful for every day with you
My love for you is eternal
